name: Can I claim if partially at fault for getting sick at work in Ogden?

mainEntity.name: Can I claim if partially at fault for getting sick at work in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, workers' comp is no-fault; covers illnesses regardless of your actions.[9] No comparative negligence in comp.[9] Key factors: (1) work causation; (2) ignore personal fault. Focus on link. Simplifies claims greatly.
